title: [Westpac,StG,BoM,BSA] Gift Card Bonus Cashback: 3% Woolworths,  6% Dan Murphy's + Std 2% Woolworths, 3% Dan Murphy's @ ShopBack
body: Payment must be made using your linked eligible Westpac, St George, Bank of Melbourne or Bank SA card. Total cashback on these gift cards: 5% Woolworths 9% Dan Murphy's
